Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add goods_type field, update email recipients logic, and update Postman collection

- Add goods_type as required field for TransferOut \(POType 3\)
- Add goods_type and receiver_name to PurchaseOrderConditionResource
- Fix email recipients to include both StoreID and OtherStoreID for transfers
- Update Postman collection with correct response structure
EOF
\)")
